title: How to add a board to multiple portfolios on Monday.com
excerpt: Is it possible to add a project board to multiple portfolios? If not, does anyone know a work around or automation / script that I could use to do?

posts.author: micheletalbott (Michele Talbott)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to add a project board to multiple portfolios? If not, does anyone know a work around or automation / script that I could use to do?

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @micheletalbott ,
In Monday.com, you cannot directly add a board to multiple portfolios. A workaround is to duplicate the board for each portfolio or use custom fields/tags within a single board to group it by portfolios. You can also explore API automations for more advanced solutions.

Zaki
Business Workflow Consultant
Ready Logic
